case_title: MEI JUAN MO VS. YUBO ZHANG

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MO, MEI JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, YUBO LI, PENG SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
